name_en: Full steel hardware 👻 Top-tier replica 😻 Changed code chip 💯 Model: M12106 Pink Small Double-sided Shopping Bag ❣️❣️ Neverfull Bandoulière Inside Out BB Handbag, this season's interpretation of the classic double-sided design, featuring the iconic Monogram canvas and grained leather on the front and back. The detachable zip pouch can be used alone or hung externally. The detachable shoulder strap makes crossbody carrying convenient, while dazzling metal hardware adds refined details.
